entry.title: Bringing Grok 4.5 to iOS, Android, Web, and X
Introducing Grok 4.5
entry.summary: Grok 4.5 is SpaceXAI's smartest model built for coding, agentic tasks, and knowledge work.

entry.title: Grok Build is Now Open Source
entry.summary: Explore the harness behind our coding agent and TUI.

entry.title: 21 New Flagship Grok Voices
entry.summary: New multilingual voices for Grok Voice, plus improved naturalness for the original five.

entry.title: Introducing the Voice Agent Builder
entry.summary: Create a personalized voice agent in under 2 minutes without a single line of code.

entry.title: Explore the markets with Interactive Brokers and Grok
entry.summary: Interactive Brokers now integrates with Grok, bringing powerful AI directly into your trading experience — portfolio analysis, scenario modeling, research, and order instructions.

entry.title: Introducing /goal
entry.summary: Use /goal for long-running autonomous task execution in Grok Build.

entry.title: Grok for Word
entry.summary: Use the Grok add-in for Microsoft Word to turn notes into documents, style and format your work, or bring research from the web into Word.

entry.title: Grok on Databricks
entry.summary: Grok models are now available on Databricks Agent Bricks.

entry.title: Grok on Amazon Bedrock
entry.summary: Grok models are now available via Amazon Bedrock.

entry.title: Grok Imagine Video 1.5
entry.summary: Improved quality at even faster speeds.

entry.title: Grok for PowerPoint
entry.summary: Grok now works inside Microsoft PowerPoint — turn outlines into slides, expand the deck, and tighten the narrative without leaving the app.

entry.title: Agent Dashboard in Grok Build
entry.summary: Manage many coding sessions at once. See what each is doing, reply to the ones that need you, and dispatch new work.

entry.title: Use Grok in Warp
entry.summary: Use your Grok and X Premium subscription inside Warp.

entry.title: Grok Build Plugin Marketplace
entry.summary: Launching the built-in plugin marketplace for Grok Build.

entry.title: Bringing real-time market sentiment to Tori, from eToro
entry.summary: Tori, eToro’s AI agent, uses models from SpaceXAI to embed real-time market sentiment directly into Tori’s investing workflow.

entry.title: Powering Gopuff's Go agent
entry.summary: Gopuff and SpaceXAI launched Go, an AI-powered shopping assistant built into the Gopuff app and powered by Grok text, audio, and image models.

entry.title: Grok Becomes the Voice of Vapi
entry.summary: Bringing frontier voice quality to millions of Vapi agents.

entry.title: Grok Imagine 1.5 Preview
entry.summary: grok-imagine-video-1.5-preview, our latest image-to-video model, is now available via the xAI API in preview.

entry.title: Composer 2.5
entry.summary: Composer 2.5 is now available in Grok Build. Try it from the /models menu.

entry.title: Grok Build 0.1 on API
entry.summary: Grok Build 0.1, our fastest coding model, is now available via the xAI API in public beta.

entry.title: Use Grok in Kilo Code
entry.summary: Use your SuperGrok or X Premium+ subscription inside Kilo Code, the open-source agentic coding platform.

entry.title: Introducing Grok Build
entry.summary: Now in early beta for all SuperGrok and X Premium Plus subscribers — Grok Build is a new coding agent that runs right from your terminal.

entry.title: Use Grok in OpenCode
entry.summary: Use your SuperGrok or X Premium subscription inside OpenCode.

entry.title: Use Grok in OpenClaw
entry.summary: Use your SuperGrok or X Premium subscription inside OpenClaw, an open-source, local-first agent and personal assistant.

entry.title: Skills in web, iOS, and Android
entry.summary: Persistent expertise for Grok. Generate documents, decks, and spreadsheets. Automate workflows. Build and share your own skills.

entry.title: Connect Grok to Hermes Agent
entry.summary: Use your Grok account and subscription inside Nous Research’s open-source, self-improving Hermes agent.

entry.title: Connectors in web, iOS, and Android
entry.summary: Deep integrations that bring the apps you use every day directly into Grok.

entry.title: Grok Imagine Quality Mode API
entry.summary: Higher realism. Stronger text rendering. Better creative control.

entry.title: New Compute Partnership with Anthropic
entry.summary: SpaceXAI has signed an agreement with Anthropic to provide access to Colossus 1.

entry.title: Custom Voices
entry.summary: Your voice. Your brand. Clone a voice from a short recording and use it across Grok Text to Speech and Voice Agent APIs.

entry.title: Grok Voice Think Fast 1.0
entry.summary: Our most capable voice agent is now available via API.

entry.title: Grok Speech to Text and Text to Speech APIs
entry.summary: Fast and accurate. Natural, expressive voices. Simple pricing. Multilingual support.

entry.title: xAI joins SpaceX
entry.summary: SpaceX announced today that it has acquired xAI.

entry.title: Grok Imagine API
entry.summary: State-of-the-art video generation across quality, cost, and latency.

entry.title: xAI Raises $20B Series E
entry.summary: xAI is rapidly accelerating its progress in building advanced AI.

entry.title: Introducing Grok Business and Grok Enterprise
entry.summary: The best assistant in the world is now Enterprise ready.

entry.title: Grok Collections API
entry.summary: State-of-the-art RAG system built directly into our API.

entry.title: Supporting the DOW's mission with AI
entry.summary: xAI is proud to be selected by the US Department of War to deliver Frontier AI

entry.title: Grok Voice Agent API
entry.summary: Bringing the power of Grok Voice to all developers.

entry.title: xAI and El Salvador Pioneer the World's First Nationwide AI Education Program
entry.summary: Announcing Our Transformative Partnership with the Government of El Salvador.

entry.title: Grok 4.1 Fast and Agent Tools API
entry.summary: Bringing the next generation of tool-calling agents to the xAI API

entry.title: Grok goes Global with KSA
entry.summary: Announcing Our Landmark Partnership with Saudi Arabia and HUMAIN

entry.title: Grok 4.1
entry.summary: Grok 4.1 is now available to all users on grok.com, 𝕏, and the iOS and Android apps. It is rolling out immediately in Auto mode and can be selected explicitly as “Grok 4.1” in the model picker.

entry.title: Expanding xAI for Government with GSA OneGov
entry.summary: Expanding ‘xAI For Government’ with more accessible AI tools for the Federal Government

entry.title: Grok 4 Fast
entry.summary: Pushing the Frontier of Cost-Efficient Intelligence

entry.title: Grok Code Fast 1
entry.summary: We're thrilled to introduce grok-code-fast-1, a speedy and economical reasoning model that excels at agentic coding.

entry.title: Announcing xAI for Government
entry.summary: We are excited to announce xAI For Government – a suite of frontier AI products available first to United States Government customers.

entry.title: Grok 4
entry.summary: Grok 4 is the most intelligent model in the world. It includes native tool use and real-time search integration, and is available now to SuperGrok and Premium+ subscribers, as well as through the xAI API. We are also introducing a new SuperGrok Heavy tier with access to Grok 4 Heavy - the most powerful version of Grok 4.

entry.title: Grok 3 Beta — The Age of Reasoning Agents
entry.summary: We are thrilled to unveil an early preview of Grok 3, our most advanced model yet, blending superior reasoning with extensive pretraining knowledge.

entry.title: xAI raises $6B Series C
entry.summary: We are partnering with A16Z, Blackrock, Fidelity Management & Research Company, Kingdom Holdings, Lightspeed, MGX, Morgan Stanley, OIA, QIA, Sequoia Capital, Valor Equity Partners and Vy Capital, amongst others.

entry.title: Bringing Grok to Everyone
entry.summary: Grok is now faster, sharper, and has improved multilingual support. It is available to everyone on the 𝕏 platform.

entry.title: Grok Image Generation Release
entry.summary: We are updating Grok's capabilities with a new autoregressive image generation model, code-named Aurora, available on the 𝕏 platform.

entry.title: API Public Beta
entry.summary: Starting today, developers can build on our Grok foundation models using our newly released API. We will run a public beta program until the end of 2024 during which everyone will get $25 of free API credits per month.

entry.title: Grok-2 Beta Release
entry.summary: We announce our new Grok-2 and Grok-2 mini models.

entry.title: Series B funding round
entry.summary: xAI is pleased to announce our series B funding round of $6 billion.

entry.title: Grok-1.5 Vision Preview
entry.summary: Connecting the digital and physical worlds with our first multimodal model.

entry.title: Announcing Grok-1.5
entry.summary: Grok-1.5 comes with improved reasoning capabilities and a context length of 128,000 tokens. Available on 𝕏 soon.

entry.title: Open Release of Grok-1
entry.summary: We are releasing the weights and architecture of our 314 billion parameter Mixture-of-Experts model Grok-1.

entry.title: Announcing PromptIDE
entry.summary: Integrated development environment for prompt engineering and interpretability research.

entry.title: Announcing Grok
entry.summary: Grok is an AI modeled after the Hitchhiker’s Guide to the Galaxy. It is intended to answer almost anything and, far harder, even suggest what questions to ask!
